---
layout: cv
title: Roman Cerdas's CV
---
# Roman Cerdas
Computer Science student focused on cybersecurity, blockchain technology, and data science.

<div id="webaddress">
<a href="mailto:roman.a.cerdas@gmail.com">roman.a.cerdas@gmail.com</a>
| <a href="https://github.com/romancerdas">GitHub</a>
| <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/roman-cerdas-11a1b0377/">LinkedIn</a>
</div>


## Currently

Studying computer science full time and developing technical skills through coursework and software projects.

### Specialized in

IT support, troubleshooting, cybersecurity fundamentals, Python, data analysis, technical documentation, Microsoft Office, and Google Workspace.


### Research interests

Cybersecurity, blockchain technology, data science, network security, software development, and data analytics.


## Education

`September 2017 - Present`
__Brigham Young University–Idaho__

- General Studies with a Computer Science focus

`July 2023 - September 2024`
__Google Cybersecurity Certificate__

- Cybersecurity fundamentals, network security, Linux, SQL, Python, and security operations



## Awards

`Present`
Eagle Scout




## Publications

### Journals

`2026`
[Spotify Analysis](https://github.com/romancerdas/spotify_analysis), a data science project exploring and analyzing Spotify-related data.

`2026`
[Chain Scout](https://github.com/romancerdas/chain_scout_folder), a blockchain-focused software project with a completed project demonstration.

`2026`
[Rust Stock Portfolio Tracker](https://github.com/romancerdas/rust_stock_portfolio_tracker), a Rust application designed to track and manage a stock portfolio.

### Patents

`2024`
Google Cybersecurity Certificate, covering cybersecurity analysis, network monitoring, incident response, Linux, SQL, and Python.


## Occupation

`September 2017 - Present`
__Brigham Young University–Idaho__

- Full-time student
- Completing coursework in computer science, cybersecurity, data science, and software development

`August 2023 - October 2023`
__Evolve 1 EMS__

- EMT
- Delivered fast and accurate responses in high-pressure situations
- Maintained detailed documentation and patient records

`November 2022 - May 2023`
__American Red Cross__, Laguna Hills, California

- Collections Specialist
- Provided customer service and support in a healthcare environment
- Managed data entry and documentation with high accuracy
- Coordinated logistics and resolved donor concerns

`November 2021 - August 2022`
__Care Ambulance Service__, Orange County, California

- EMT-B
- Responded to emergency calls and supported patient care
- Maintained equipment and ensured operational readiness
- Collaborated with team members under pressure
